title: Better Discord Integration
description: A powerful Minecraft–Discord bridge with real-time chat sync, join/leave events, online status,  without discord bot token.
body:
# Better Discord Integration

Connect your Minecraft server to Discord — two-way chat, join/leave alerts, server status, and more.

---

## 🚀 Setup (From Zero)

### 1️⃣ Add the Discord Bot
- Join your Minecraft server as **admin**
- Run: `/discord add-bot`
- Click the link that appears in chat
- Add the **Nexus** bot to your Discord server
  ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcc08d2b11119007cae120645c0ecce07f803ec8.png)

---

### 2️⃣ Link a Discord Channel
- Right-click a channel in Discord → **Copy Channel ID**
- Run: `/discord channel <channel_id>`
- The plugin connects automatically ✅
  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/049ae22a6d9de7235a7da203e78f0cd55a512006.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35e707bf79bceb6bd0a97b4806b4b25755b757d7.png)
---

### 3️⃣ (Optional) Set Up a Webhook
With a webhook, your Minecraft messages show up in Discord **with your skin face** as the profile picture.

- Go to your Discord channel → **Edit Channel → Integrations → Webhooks**
- Create a new webhook and copy the URL
- Run: `/discord webhook <webhook_url>`

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4ca6ca83c549c5867755c8cc2c7ad6dd1472f9c.png)

---

## What Happens After Setup

### ✅ Server Status & Online Players
- When the server starts, the bot connects automatically
- The bot's nickname updates to show how many players are online

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76cbd14b32b52ff2d126295c686cc54134b367f9.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9b71721eb94c658ba54e5cc06cd01f1c89db1c1.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7db9982eb7a7659510df76fe8399bb8ed7b9811c.png)

---

### 👋 Player Join & Leave
- A message is sent to Discord whenever a player joins or leaves

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c05ea6d2e3f37615211f22b6f2c9ab2636fcf677.png)

---

### 💬 Chat — Minecraft → Discord
- Your messages appear in Discord
- Your Minecraft head shows as the profile picture

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c77d88c0926396331369b2a7becf2daaa843511c.png)

---

### 💬 Chat — Discord → Minecraft
- Messages appear in-game colored in **purple** so you know they're from Discord

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/649dee2e1133a654bf4eafe28d6db917deb1aa8a.png)

---

## ⚙️ Commands
> Requires **operator** permissions.

| Command | What it does |
|---|---|
| `/discord add-bot` | Get the link to add the bot to your server |
| `/discord channel <id>` | Link a Discord channel |
| `/discord webhook <url>` | Set a Discord webhook URL |
| `/discord webhook` | Toggle the webhook on/off |
| `/discord joinleave` | Toggle join/leave notifications |
| `/discord server` | Toggle server start/stop notifications |
| `/discord info` | View current settings |
| `/discord reconnect` | Reconnect to Discord |

---

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00df6c41a147401718cbbd0984a86ff525a29f14.png)

## Done ✅
Your Minecraft server is now fully connected to Discord.
